mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin_user WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM admin_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM admin_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_user (username, display_name, password_hash, salt, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{displayName}, #{passwordHash}, #{salt}, #{status}, #{lastLoginAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, COALESCE(#{deleted}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET username = #{username}, display_name = #{displayName}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, salt = #{salt}, status = #{status}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
